page.title: Dashboard & orders
page.subtitle: Keep an eye on packaging weight and your EPR setup at a glance.

material_breakdown.title: Material breakdown
material_breakdown.empty: Nothing here yet — finish setting up the app to see your material mix.

empty.heading: No tracked orders yet
empty.body: New orders with calculated packaging will show up here as soon as they come in.

inventory.title: Add your packaging items
inventory.description: List the boxes, tapes and void fillers you actually use to ship orders.

mapping.title: Match packaging to products
mapping.description: Tell us which primary packaging holds each product (mailer, tray, blister…).

rules.title: Set your shipping rules
rules.description: Decide which outer box, tape and filler you use based on how many items the order has.

backfill.title: Import your order history
backfill.description_first_run: We import paid orders from Jan 1st until today to recalculate EPR weights. One-time job, may take a few minutes.
backfill.description_rerun: History has already been imported. Run it again to pick up the most recent orders.

compliance.title: Add your EPR registration numbers
compliance.description: You're shipping to countries that require an EPR registration. Add the missing numbers in settings: {{items}}.

backfill.summary: {{processed}} orders imported · {{duplicates}} already there · {{excluded}} skipped (country not handled).

banners.failed_body: The import didn't complete: {{error}}. You can try again whenever you like.
banners.resync_body: Reinstalled the app or received orders while it was off? Re-run the import to pull in any orders that were missed — orders already saved are skipped automatically.

toasts.already_running: Import is already running — track the progress below.
toasts.started: Import started. Feel free to keep using the app.

errors.load_dashboard: We couldn't load the dashboard data. Please try again in a moment.

compliance_banner.title: Missing EPR registration numbers
compliance_banner.body: You're shipping to countries that require a registration, but some numbers haven't been entered yet: {{items}}. Add them in settings.
